vars.pitch: MedScribe is an AI medical scribing app for US dermatology clinics, billed monthly per provider.
vars.candidate_body:
ScribeTech (2019-2023) sold AI ambient medical scribing to US primary-care clinics at $200/provider/month. Hit ~120 clinics and $4M ARR. Failed when Epic and athenahealth bundled comparable scribing features in 2022, driving churn from 8% to 32%. Shut down March 2023.

Sources: https://example.com/scribetech-postmortem

expected_output.name: ScribeTech
expected_output.one_liner: AI scribing for US primary-care clinics killed by EHR bundling.

market.rationale: US healthtech SMB clinics; specialty differs.

expected_output.why_similar: Both target US clinic providers with monthly per-seat AI scribing.
expected_output.where_diverged: MedScribe targets dermatology specifically, where EHR bundling has been slower; ScribeTech sold to primary care where Epic/athena dominate.
lessons_for_input: Pick a specialty Epic and athena are slow to bundle into.
Build an integration moat that survives a bundled-scribing release.
Sign multi-year contracts before incumbents copy.
